$description: DRAFT tier-1 primitives for @atelier/tokens. Anchors extracted from the CMYK Zed theme + nixos-config/home/palette.nix, then regenerated as full 50-950 ramps. Ramps seeded in tints.dev (anchor pinned at 500) and hand-tuned in Huetone (OKLCH) against APCA targets on the dark canvas (neutral-950): hue held flat, chroma shaped to a single hump per ramp, green light-end cliff and 200 chroma spike removed. Shade number = lightness position; 500 = base hue. Semantic layer (tier 2 'color') to follow.

color.$description: Tier-2 web semantic roles. Dark-first; all values reference tier-1 palette. Light theme to follow.

canvas.$description: page background - the floor everything sits on, below the surface ramp

surface.$description: Element surface ramp, dark-first. The standard subtle/default/strong steps the elevation ladder draws its surface from: a sunk element shows a darker (subtle) surface, a popped element a lighter (strong) one. Mapping: sunk->subtle, half-sunk/default/half-pop->default, pop->strong (see shadow + the elevation ADR).

subtle.$description: recessed surfaces (sunk): inputs, wells. Same value as canvas - a sunk element reads as a hole back down to the floor.

default.$description: resting surfaces (half-sunk / default / half-pop): cards, panels, fields

strong.$description: raised surfaces (pop) + overlays: popped buttons, menus, modals

default.$description: brand fill - the signature hot magenta. Pair with dark fg (see fg), matching the editor's bright-accent-on-dark character.

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge: a deep magenta read as the lit fill's shadowed side (the inspiration's toggle has a dark-purple side, not grey). Darker than active/600 so it reads as depth, not a pressed state.

fg.$description: text on primary fill: dark plum-black on hot magenta reaches ~6.1:1 / APCA Lc ~78 - body-safe, and keeps the bright fill rather than darkening it

default.$description: brand fill - the lavender from the editor. Pair with dark fg (see fg).

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge: a deep violet read as the lit fill's shadowed side.

fg.$description: text on secondary fill: dark plum-black on lavender reaches ~6.4:1 - body-safe

solid.$description: status fill - bright coral red, kept vivid.

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge for solid danger buttons

on-solid.$description: dark text on solid fill: ~6.1:1, body-safe - consistent with success/warning/info/brand (all dark-on-vivid)

solid.$description: bright fill - dark text reaches APCA Lc ~63, body-safe.

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge for solid success buttons

solid.$description: bright fill - dark text reaches APCA Lc ~70, body-safe.

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge for solid warning buttons

solid.$description: bright fill - dark text reaches APCA Lc ~62, body-safe.

edge.$description: skeuomorphic side/edge for solid info buttons

font.$description: Type families. Tier-1 primitives (sans, mono) map to Tailwind --font-sans / --font-mono. Tier-2 roles (body, heading) encode the actual pairing decision: body is JetBrains Mono, headings/display are Atkinson Hyperlegible bold (precedent: a prior project's mono-body + bold-sans-heading layout).

sans.$description: Atkinson Hyperlegible. Display/heading face. Classic cut ships 400/700 only - no medium/semibold.

font-weight.$description: Atkinson classic + JetBrains Mono body both read best at 400/700. JetBrains has 500 if inline mono emphasis is wanted later; Atkinson classic does not (would need Atkinson Hyperlegible Next variable for intermediate weights).

text.$description: Type scale, rem, base 1rem = 16px. Minor third (1.2) modular scale rounded to a 2px grid for clean rems. Punchier than the vault's major-second heading scale - suits the bold/neo-brutalist display range. Tradeoff: no 18px step (lg jumps to 20px).

leading.$description: Unitless line-height. Mono body wants a touch more leading than sans; normal=1.5 for JetBrains body, tight for Atkinson display.

tracking.$description: Letter-spacing in em (intentionally em, not px/rem - scales with font size). Mono runs comfortably at 0; tighten large Atkinson display a hair.

spacing.$description: Spacing scale on a 4px (0.25rem) base. Numeric keys mirror Tailwind --spacing-* utilities. Drives padding/margin/gap. Explicit values (not a single multiplier) keep the scale portable to non-web surfaces.

radius.$description: Corner radius, t-shirt sized, maps to Tailwind --radius-*. Range spans the dual aesthetic: 'none' for the neo-brutalist hard-edge look, mid steps for neo-skeuomorphic soft cards, 'full' for pills/avatars. Default card radius is a component-tier decision; this just provides the range.

shadow.$description: Elevation ladder (S.C.R.A.P.S.-inspired, dark-first): a symmetric 5-step depth scale around a flat resting default. Below default elements sink via inset shadow (recessed); above they pop via a hard, no-blur bottom edge (thickness) plus a soft ambient. NOT a blur ladder. Pairs with the `surface` colour ramp (sunk->subtle, default->default, pop->strong) and the `lift` translate companion. OVERRIDE NOTE: the default hard edge colour is the neutral border (color.border.default), which reads as a visible side against the dark canvas (neutral.950 was invisible - it equalled the canvas). Brand/coloured components must still override the edge to their own dark shade at the component tier (e.g. a primary button uses dark-magenta, not the neutral border) - the inspiration's purple toggle has a dark-purple side, not a grey one.

sunk.$description: lowest: deeply recessed. inputs, wells. Neo-brutalist hard edge: a solid 12px band of surface.subtle inset at the top, no blur (~2x pop's 6px edge). Sits on surface.default; the hard step down to the subtle tone reads as a deep recess. Pair with surface.default.

half-sunk.$description: lower: shallow recess. selected checkbox/radio, switch track, disabled input. The shallower sibling of sunk: a solid 6px hard band of surface.subtle inset at the top, no blur. Sits on surface.default, recesses to surface.subtle.

default.$description: resting / flush: prose, help/error text, intermediate fields, flat-variant buttons. Resettable no-op. Pair with surface.default.

half-pop.$description: higher: gentle lift. hovered buttons, switch thumb, static cards, unchecked checkbox/radio. Neo-brutalist hard 3px neutral-border edge below, no blur. Pair with surface.default; press with lift.half.

pop.$description: highest: prominent lift. resting default buttons. Neo-brutalist hard 6px edge below, no blur. Edge colour is per-brand at component tier (see override note). Pair with surface.strong; press with lift.full.

lift.$description: Y-translation companion to the elevation ladder. Each value equals the matching shadow's bottom-edge height, so pressing a popped element flush (translate down by its lift while the shadow drops to default) keeps the element's top edge in place rather than appearing to rise. Backs the translation/edge harmonisation the hand-rolled component shadows missed.

full.$description: pop edge height: full press-to-flush displacement

duration.$description: Motion durations. Tactile feedback is quick; overlays slower.

spring.$description: slight overshoot - the tactile 'lift to greet the cursor' bounce
